Container.Name: scrutiny-collector-zfs
Container.Overview: Scrutiny ZFS Pool Collector (Hub/Spoke mode). Monitors ZFS pool health and sends data to the Scrutiny web server. Requires a running Scrutiny web server instance. Only available for amd64 (x86_64) systems.

Config.Name: API Endpoint
Config.Description: Scrutiny web server URL (e.g. http://scrutiny-web:8080). Required.

Config.Name: Host ID
Config.Description: Unique identifier for this collector host.

Config.Name: Cron Schedule
Config.Description: ZFS pool data collection schedule (cron format). Default: every 15 minutes.

Config.Name: Run on Startup
Config.Description: Run ZFS pool data collection immediately on container startup.
